title: Fact Checker Agent Contract
description: Input/output schema for the Fact Checker Agent (Veritas). Validates research_output.md citations, sources, and factual accuracy. Output must conform to agents/fact_checker/templates/fact_check_feedback.json.

research_output.description: Content of research_output.md (the research to validate)

campaign_id.description: Optional identifier for the fact check header

knowledge_base_path.description: Optional: path to knowledge base for cross-referencing (defaults to knowledge_base/ in mai-collective)

output.description: Fact check feedback must follow agents/fact_checker/templates/fact_check_feedback.json. Include: overall status (PASS/NEEDS_REVISION/CRITICAL_ISSUES); source counts; validation results per source type (web, PDF, knowledge base, academic); issues list with location, severity, description, suggested fix; actionable feedback for the Research Agent to address critical issues.
